activities.name: Walk
activities.cue: Just walk. Pace doesn't matter — being outside and moving does.

activities.name: Run
activities.cue: Conversational pace unless you decided otherwise before you left. Warm into it — first 3 minutes easy.

activities.name: Bike
activities.cue: Warm up 5 min easy before any hard pushes. Hard means legs burning; easy means actually easy.

activities.name: Sprint Intervals
activities.cue: 2 min jog + leg swings first — sprints carry cold-start injury risk; the warm-up is not optional. 80–90%, never all-out.

activities.name: Weightlifting
activities.cue: Warm-up sets first. Quality reps over load. Stop the set when form goes, not when ego does.

activities.name: Gym Session
activities.cue: Have the first exercise decided before you walk in — the plan survives contact better than motivation does.

activities.name: Jump Rope
activities.cue: Stay light on your feet. Land on the toes, keep the bounce small.

activities.name: KB Circuit
activities.cue: Move with purpose, not urgency. Don't sacrifice the hinge for speed.

presets.name: Sprint Intervals
presets.description: 2 min easy jog to warm up. Then 8 × 30 s sprint / 60 s walk. Cool down 1–2 min.

presets.name: 12-min Run
presets.description: Easy conversational pace for the full 12 min. No stops.

presets.name: Bike — Hard Pushes
presets.description: 5 min easy warm-up, then alternate 30 s hard / 90 s easy for the remaining time.

presets.name: Outdoor KB Circuit
presets.description: AMRAP 12 min: KB swings 15 / goblet squat 10 / pushups 10. Rest as needed.

presets.name: Jump-Rope Intervals
presets.description: 40 s on / 20 s off for 12 min. Simple footwork — no tricks.
